summary: Create missing core/session.py and core/events.py modules to complete the tflow architecture per design document Section 3.1
approach: Implement the two missing core modules that the design document specifies should exist in src/tflow/core/. Task 1 creates session management for workflow context coordination. Task 2 creates core event definitions.

design_decisions.decision: core/session.py should provide workflow-level Session management
design_decisions.rationale: Design Section 3.1 specifies Session management in core/ for coordinating WorkflowEngine, JobManager, and ExecutionStore

design_decisions.decision: core/events.py should provide base event infrastructure
design_decisions.rationale: Design Section 3.1 specifies events.py in core/ as the central event definition location

patterns: Follow existing dataclass-based design in codebase
